# Spoken Time Ruler

Shows estimated spoken-time ticks in Obsidian's editor gutter.

## Development

```bash
npm install
npm run build
```

Then reload Obsidian and enable **Spoken Time Ruler** under Community plugins.

## Notes

The first version attaches ticks to Markdown source lines. If a paragraph is one very long wrapped line, the tick is attached to that source line rather than the exact visual wrap row.
